news.headline: Agnes Pelton's "Flowering" to be unveiled at Moran's sale on August 13, 2024. Collectors excited over fresh painting.
news.summary: On Tuesday, August 13th, 2024 at 12:00pm PDT in Los Angeles, news broke that Moran's Art + Design sale scheduled for July 1, 2024, is creating a lot of excitement among collectors. The sale will showcase a newly found painting by the American Modernist, Agnes Pelton. The painting is fresh to the market and has sparked a lot of buzz.

news.headline: Global nail care products market to grow by USD 5.96 billion from 2024-2028, fueled by non-toxic solutions, reports Technavio.
news.summary: In New York as of July 1, 2024, it has been reported that the global market for nail care products is projected to experience a significant increase, with an estimated growth of USD 5.96 billion expected from 2024 to 2028, as outlined by Technavio. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.3% throughout the forecast period. This growth is attributed to the availability of non-toxic options for nail care within the market.

news.headline: Leafguard® acquires branch of BELDON Roofing in San Antonio, Texas, expanding to 19 counties in Texas. Great Day Improvements now has 280 locations in 120 markets.
news.summary: In East Brunswick, New Jersey, Leafguard® has acquired a new branch in San Antonio, Texas, from BELDON Roofing Company. This strategic move will enable Leafguard® to extend its services to cover 19 counties in Texas. Leafguard® and Englert®, part of Great Day Improvements, LLC since their acquisition in June 2024, have significantly expanded the company's operations. With this purchase, Great Day Improvements now operates in 280 locations across 120 markets, providing homeowners with improved access to their products and services.

news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) announces Eddy Kleid as President of Central Georgia Division, supporting company growth.
news.summary: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) has revealed key leadership changes to bolster its growth and success. Eddy Kleid, who has been with the company since 2017 as VP of Finance, will now serve as Division President for the Central Georgia Division. This marks a significant milestone in the company's expansion efforts. Under Eddy's guidance, the finance team has experienced substantial growth, contributing to the overall success of Smith Douglas Homes Corp.

news.headline: AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI) to announce Q2 2024 earnings on Aug. 1, 2024, followed by conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT. Access at (800) 715-9871 (passcode 4378083) or online at www.axt.com.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI), a prominent manufacturer of compound semiconductor substrates, is set to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 through a press release immediately after the market closes on August 1, 2024. Furthermore, the company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 1:30 p.m. PT to delve into these results. The conference call can be joined by dialing (800) 715-9871 with the passcode 4378083, and will also be broadcasted live on www.axt.com. For those unable to participate, recordings will be available for later access.

news.headline: Global consulting firm RGP acquires Reference Point, expands financial services consulting.
news.summary: RGP, a worldwide consulting firm based in Irvine, California, recently completed the acquisition of Reference Point. This move marks a significant expansion of RGP's consulting services within the financial services sector.

news.headline: Domo's "Data Never Sleeps" infographic wins 2024 Communicator Award, tracking global data usage with increases across online platforms.
news.summary: Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) from Silicon Slopes, Utah, has announced that its annual “Data Never Sleeps” infographic has won in the Academy of Interactive and Visual Arts (AIVA)’s Communicator Awards for the second year in a row. The “Data Never Sleeps” infographic has been monitoring global data usage minute by minute for over ten years, showing significant growth in activity on platforms like Instagram, X, Amazon, Venmo, and more. This annual infographic sheds light on the increasing online activity across various platforms.

news.headline: Logitech proposes board changes, shareholders asked to elect 3 new members: Donald Allan, Owen Mahoney, Hanneke Faber.
news.summary: Logitech International, a global technology company listed on SIX and Nasdaq as LOGN and LOGI, respectively, has revealed plans to propose new board members to shareholders. The board is set to request the election of Donald Allan, current president and chief executive officer of Stanley Black & Decker, Inc., Owen Mahoney, ex-president and CEO of Nexon Co., Ltd., and Hanneke Faber, the CEO of Logitech. This decision reflects the company's commitment to enhancing board leadership and governance.

news.headline: Blend (NYSE: BLND) listed in 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Digital Banking Platforms, known for Builder Platform agility.
news.summary: San Francisco-based company Blend, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BLND, has been acknowledged in the 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Digital Banking Platforms. Their Builder Platform, known for its agility, aims to provide innovative banking products quickly and efficiently by utilizing reusable components and top-notch workflows to offer unique borrower experiences. This recognition solidifies Blend's position as a key player in the cloud banking services sector.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. released its monthly portfolio update as of May 31, 2024, including top 10 fixed-income holdings.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AWF] disclosed its monthly portfolio update as of May 31, 2024. The Fund’s top 10 fixed-income holdings by portfolio percentage included U.S. Treasury Notes and other assets. The update provides investors with insights into the Fund's investment allocation as of the specified date, helping them track the Fund's performance and strategy.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. [NYSE: AFB] released May 31, 2024, portfolio update, including top 10 holdings.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. announced its latest monthly portfolio update. As of May 31, 2024, the Fund's top 10 fixed-income holdings included Lamar with a portfolio percentage of 1.00. The Fund, listed under NYSE as AFB, continues to monitor and adjust its investment holdings in the municipal income sector. The update provides interested parties with insights into the Fund's investment strategies and performance metrics.

news.headline: Grid Dynamics (Nasdaq: GDYN) will discuss Q2 2024 financial results in a conference call on August 1 at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: In San Ramon, California, Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: GDYN) revealed plans for a video conference at 4:30 p.m. ET on Thursday, August 1, 2024, to delve into their second quarter 2024 financial performance. Prior to the virtual meeting, a press release with detailed results will be circulated. The webcast can be viewed on the Investor Relations section of their website. Grid Dynamics is recognized for its enterprise-level digital transformation services and solutions, positioning itself as a frontrunner in this sector.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds announces distribution rates: $0.0655 per share for AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the latest distributions from the AllianceBernstein Closed-End Funds were announced as follows: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF) declared a distribution of $0.0655 per share. The ex-date for this distribution is set for July 11, 2024, with the record date being the same. Shareholders can expect payment to be made on July 26, 2024.

news.headline: Verisign's Q2 2024 financial results to be reported on July 25, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. (EDT) with news release at 4:05 p.m.
news.summary: VeriSign, a leading provider of internet infrastructure and domain name registry services, will hold its second-quarter earnings call on July 25, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. EDT. The earnings news release will be sent to wire services at around 4:05 p.m. EDT on the same day and will be accessible on VeriSign's website at https://investor.verisign.com. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol VRSN.

news.headline: iLearningEngines (NASDAQ: AILE) joins Russell 3000® Index with other related indexes on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Bethesda, Maryland, iLearningEngines, Inc. (NASDAQ: AILE) disclosed that it has become a part of the broad-market Russell 3000® Index and other related indexes. iLearningEngines, a frontrunner in AI-driven learning and work automation, confirmed this development as trading commenced on the mentioned date.

news.headline: Y-mAbs appoints Peter Pfreundschuh as CFO on June 28, 2024, focusing on cancer treatment products. Gazetted on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1st, 2024, Y-mAbs Therapeutics, Inc. declared Peter Pfreundschuh as the new Chief Financial Officer. Y-mAbs is a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol YMAB, specializing in innovative radioimmunotherapy and antibody-based cancer treatments. The appointment of Mr. Pfreundschuh, effective from June 28, 2024, positions him as a direct report to Mike Rossi, who serves as the President and Chief Executive Officer of the company.

news.headline: Versus Systems restructures with new CEO amid key investor engagement; new Interim CEO appointed on July 01, 2024.
news.summary: The technology company Versus Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VS) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, declared on July 01, 2024, the selection of a new Interim Chief Executive Officer.

news.headline: Phillips Edison & Company appoints Devin Murphy to Board of Directors, increasing from 9 to 10 members effective July 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on July 01, 2024, Phillips Edison & Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: PECO), a prominent owner and operator of grocery-anchored neighborhood shopping centers in the US, revealed the enlargement of its Board of Directors from nine to ten members. The appointment of Devin Murphy to the Board, beginning on July 2, 2024, was also announced. Phillips Edison & Company, Inc. is known for being one of the leading entities in its industry.

news.headline: Seacoast Banking Corp. of Florida will reveal Q2 earnings on July 25, 2024.
CenterSquare Investment Management relocates headquarters from Plymouth Meeting, PA to modern space in Conshohocken.
news.summary: CenterSquare Investment Management ("CenterSquare") has recently relocated from its longstanding office in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, to a more contemporary space in Conshohocken, PA. This move signifies the company's commitment to global expansion. The firm, headquartered in Plymouth Meeting since its establishment, has finally made the transition on July 1, 2024. This new development reflects CenterSquare's growth and evolution in the industry.

news.headline: Calamos Investments' closed-end funds (CHI, CHY, CSQ, CGO, CHW, CCD, CPZ) to distribute payouts, reveal sources, for July 2024.
news.summary: In July 2024, Calamos Investments®* disclosed the monthly distributions and distribution sources paid to shareholders of its seven closed-end funds in Metro Chicago. The distributions were made in accordance with the Funds' distribution plans. Shareholders received Fund Distribution Payable.

news.headline: Sprouts Farmers Market (Nasdaq: SFM) will report Q2 earnings on July 29, 2024, with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market, a public company listed as SFM on Nasdaq, has revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2024. The announcement is scheduled for release after the market closes on July 29, 2024. Management of Sprouts will hold a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time that day to delve into the quarterly results. Those interested can access a webcast of the call on investors.sprouts.com. It's advisable for participants to register on the site about ten minutes before the call begins.

news.headline: Pure Barre's Pure ACED Challenge beginning alongside summer games, attracting 40,000 participants last year.
news.summary: A fitness brand under Xponential Fitness, Pure Barre®, introduced the Pure ACED Challenge in Irvine, Calif. This event coincides with the summer games at various studios, offering a full-body barre workout. The challenge aims to enhance strength and confidence to achieve summer fitness goals. Last year, the challenge had 40,000 participants, making it a popular fitness event. The challenge provides a fun way to engage in the excitement of the elite sporting event while working towards personal fitness objectives.

news.headline: Artivion amends agreement with Endospan, providing $25M in debt funding for FDA approval. Purchase option reduced to $135M. Earnout minimum eliminated.
news.summary: Endospan has secured an additional $25 million in debt funding to facilitate the FDA approval process for their NEXUS project. The upfront payment linked to the purchase option has been decreased to $135 million, including loan off-set, while the minimum earnout amount of $100 million has been eliminated. The financial backing from Artivion marks a significant milestone towards achieving the necessary regulatory clearance and operational success for Endospan.

news.headline: Swedish Match USA presents to FDA Committee on General Snus modified risk claim, guided by PMI; FDA review ongoing.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Swedish Match USA, Inc. representatives, affiliated with Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM), shared insights with the Tobacco Products Scientific Advisory Committee (TPSAC) on June 26, 2024. This committee, consisting of autonomous scientific experts, offers regulatory recommendations to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's (FDA) Center for Tobacco Products. The presentation, taking place over half a day, was a component of the FDA's evaluation of Swedish Match's application to sustain marketing Ge.

news.headline: Cedar Fair and Six Flags merger completed, creating a top amusement park operator.
news.summary: The merger between Cedar Fair and Six Flags, two major players in the amusement park industry based in Charlotte, North Carolina, has been successfully completed. This merger, considered a "Merger of Equals," has created a leading amusement park operator with a significant presence in the market. With Cedar Fair and Six Flags joining forces, they now operate a combined total of over 40 amusement parks across North America. This strategic move is expected to create new opportunities for growth and advancement in the industry.

news.headline: Meta Platforms, Inc. will announce second quarter 2024 results on July 31st after market close. Conference call at 2:00 PM.
news.summary: Today, Menlo Park-based Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) revealed that the financial results for the second quarter of 2024 will be disclosed after the market closes on July 31, 2024. Following this, a conference call will take place at 2:00 PM to delve into the findings.

news.headline: Akebia Therapeutics grants 517,000 shares to 5 new employees, enhancing fight against kidney disease.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on July 1, 2024, Akebia Therapeutics®, Inc. (Nasdaq: AKBA), a biopharmaceutical firm dedicated to improving the wellbeing of those affected by kidney disease, awarded stock options to five recently recruited staff members allowing them to buy a total of 517,000 shares.

news.headline: Instructure Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: INST) acquires Scribbles, enhancing K-12 credentialing & records management on its platform.
news.summary: Salt Lake City, July 1, 2024 - Instructure Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: INST) shared news of its successful acquisition of Scribbles, a prominent company offering credentialing and records management services to K-12 school districts nationwide. This acquisition marks a significant development in Instructure's expansion efforts.

news.headline: Compass, the largest US residential brokerage, will announce Q2 2024 earnings on July 31.Character count: 77
news.summary: In New York on July 1, 2024, Compass, Inc. (NYSE: COMP), the leading residential real estate brokerage in the US based on sales volume, revealed that its financial report for Q2 2024 will be disclosed post-market hours on Wednesday, July 31, 2024.

news.headline: Western Midstream Partners, LP (WES) announces availability of 2023 Schedule K-3 online for unitholders. Important for international tax relevance.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Western Midstream Partners, LP (NYSE: WES) made an announcement that the Schedule K-3 for the year 2023, which includes important international tax details, is now accessible online. Shareholders in need of this information are encouraged to retrieve their individual Schedules.

news.headline: Karyopharm (NASDAQ: KPTI) granted 8,800 RSUs to three new employees. Commercial pharma company focuses on cancer therapies.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc., a pharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under KPTI, based in Newton, Massachusetts, made a statement through PRNewswire. The company revealed that they have provided a total of 8,800 restricted stock units (RSUs) to three individuals who are recently employed by the firm. Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc. specializes in introducing innovative cancer treatments and is currently operating in the commercial sector.

news.headline: Poseida Therapeutics to participate in Stifel's 2024 Virtual Cell Therapy Forum on July 1st. PSTX (Nasdaq) focusing on cancer & rare diseases treatments.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in San Diego, Poseida Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTX), a company specializing in allogeneic cell therapy and genetic medicines for cancer and rare disease patients, shared that their President...

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics SA grants 172,400 options to purchase shares to six new employees on July 1, 2024 as an employment inducement.
news.summary: ADC Therapeutics SA announced granting options to purchase an aggregate of 172,400 common shares to six new employees on July 1, 2024. These grants were provided as inducements for their employment, approved by the Compensation Committee of the Company's Board of Directors. The grants are part of the Inducement Plan aimed at motivating and rewarding employees for high performance and contributions to the Company's success. Following NYSE's Listed Company Manual Rule 303A.08, the Grants will vest and become exercisable over time, with 25% available on the first anniversary and the full award accessible on the fourth anniversary of the grant date, contingent on continued employment.

news.headline: Stocks start second half of 2024 strong with Dow closing higher.
Oaktree Specialty Lending Corp sets Q3 earnings call for Aug 1, 2024. Mark your calendars! #finance #investing
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a new low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.5%. This decrease represents the addition of 250,000 new jobs to the economy, bringing the total number of employed individuals to 5.8 million. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a surge, with the main index rising by 3.5% in response to the positive economic indicators. Experts are attributing this growth to increased consumer spending and business investments in key sectors. This news comes as a welcome relief amidst ongoing concerns about the impact of recent geopolitical events on the global economy.

news.headline: Dennis Ackerman to retire from Bel Fuse Inc. on July 31, 2024 after 37 years; Steve Dawson appointed as President of Bel Power Solutions and Protection segment.
news.summary: Bel Fuse Inc., based in West Orange, New Jersey, has announced that Dennis Ackerman will be retiring from the company on July 31, 2024, after dedicating 37 years of service. Ackerman held the position of President of Bel Power Solutions and Protection since 2014. Steve Dawson, previously the Vice President of Marketing and Business Development for the Power segment, will be taking over as the new President of Bel Power Solutions and Protection starting July 1, 2024. Bel Fuse Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the tickers BELFA and BELFB.

news.headline: AVITA Medical appoints Nicole Kelsey as Chief Legal & Compliance Officer and Corporate Secretary, replacing retiring GC Donna Shiroma.
news.summary: AVITA Medical has named Nicole Kelsey as the new Chief Legal and Compliance Officer and Corporate Secretary, taking over from Donna Shiroma, who is retiring from her position as General Counsel. Nicole Kelsey will be responsible for overseeing legal and compliance matters within the company. Donna Shiroma, the outgoing General Counsel, will be stepping down after serving in the role for a considerable amount of time. This change in leadership comes as AVITA Medical looks to continue its growth and expansion in the industry.

news.headline: Covenant Logistics Group, Inc. to release Q2 earnings on July 24, 2024, with conference call on July 25, 2024, at 10am Eastern. Call in at 877-550-1505. Audio replay available at 800-645-7964, access code 3895#.
news.summary: Covenant Logistics Group, Inc. (Nasdaq/GS: CVLG) from Chattanooga, Tenn., is gearing up to report its second quarter earnings on July 24, 2024, post 4:00 p.m. Eastern time. Following this, the company will conduct a live conference call on July 25, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time to delve into the details of its financial performance. If you have any queries, feel free to participate by dialing 877-550-1505 (U.S./Canada) or 0800-524-4760 (International). A week-long audio replay will be accessible by calling 800-645-7964 with access code 3895#. Moreover, an extended audio replay will be available on the investor website labeled "Audio Archives." For further financial and statistical data related to the Company’s discussion during the call, you can refer to their website at www.covenantlogistics.com/investors under the section “Earnings Info.”

news.headline: Roadzen Inc. (NASDAQ:RDZN) reports record revenue growth with $46.7 million in full-year revenue, up 245% from last year, resulting in a net loss of $99.7 million impacted by non-cash items. Adjusted EBITDA loss of $10.4 million, a 5.1% increase from last year. Roadzen was included in the Russell 2000, 3000, and Microcap indexes on June 28, 2024, attracting new institutional shareholders. CEO cites strong revenue growth and market expansion in the U.S., U.K., and India. Roadzen emphasizes readiness for another breakthrough year in 2025, focusing on operational efficiency and growth strategies.
news.summary: Roadzen Inc. reported their fiscal year results for the twelve-month period ending March 31, 2024. They achieved a significant revenue increase to $46.7 million, up 245% from the prior year's $13.5 million. However, they experienced a net loss of $99.7 million, with an adjusted EBITDA loss of $10.4 million. Roadzen expanded its presence in the U.S., U.K., and India, serving 101 large enterprise clients and approximately 3,200 small and medium businesses. The company streamlined operations, reduced headcount by 7%, and improved their balance sheet, with cash on hand increasing to $11.2 million. Roadzen was included in the Russell 2000, Russell 3000, and Russell Microcap indexes. Despite the loss, the company aims to establish themselves as a leader in vertical AI for auto insurance and remain optimistic about future growth.

news.headline: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.10 dividend per share for voting and non-voting stock for Q2 2024. Payable on August 9, 2024.
news.summary: James A. Dowd, President and CEO of Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc., the bank holding company of Pathfinder Bank, recently disclosed that the company will be issuing a cash dividend of $0.10 per share on both the voting common and non-voting common stock. Additionally, a cash dividend of $0.10 per notional share for the issued warrant pertaining to the fiscal quarter ending June 30, 2024, has been declared. The dividends for the second quarter of 2024 are scheduled for payment on August 9, 2024, to shareholders of record as of July 19, 2024. This announcement was made on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: Byrna Technologies (Nasdaq: BYRN) added to Russell 3000® Index post reconstitution on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: Andover, Massachusetts - Byrna Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: BYRN) has recently been incorporated into the Russell 3000® Index, marking a significant milestone for the technology company known for its less-lethal personal security products. The addition to the index came as a result of the annual reconstitution of the Russell indexes and came into effect after the U.S. market closed on June 28, 2024. This move is expected to enhance Byrna's visibility and potentially attract more investors to the company.

news.headline: Verve Therapeutics issues equity award to one new employee on June 28, 2024, as part of the 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Verve Therapeutics, a biotechnology company in Boston, granted equity awards to one new employee as part of the company’s 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This initiative was crucial for securing the new employee who joined the company. Verve Therapeutics is known for its innovative approach to addressing cardiovascular disease through gene editing medicines. This move aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and signifies the company's commitment to attracting and retaining top talent.

news.headline: Integer Holdings Corporation announced that its 2.125% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 can be converted by holders from July 1, 2024 to September 30, 2024. This news also includes the upsize of the company's Revolving Credit Facility.
news.summary: Integer Holdings Corporation, a prominent medical device contract development and manufacturing organization based in Plano, Texas, announced that its 2.125% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 (NYSE: ITGR) are eligible for conversion by holders starting from July 1, 2024, until September 30, 2024. Holders have the option to convert the Notes into cash up to the principal amount or into a combination of cash, company common stock, or both, depending on the Company's election, for any excess amount over the principal. Future convertibility decisions will be made based on the terms outlined in the Indenture governing the Notes.

news.headline: Codexis acquires Crosswalk Therapeutics' gene therapy assets for Fabry and Pompe diseases, with milestone payments and royalties.
news.summary: Codexis, Inc., a prominent enzyme engineering company based in Redwood City, California, has recently disclosed that it has signed an asset purchase deal with Crosswalk Therapeutics. This agreement involves the transfer of Codexis's investigational compounds for Fabry and Pompe diseases. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, Codexis stands to gain future payments tied to developmental and commercial milestones. Additionally, the company is entitled to a net sales-based royalty in the low-to-mid single-digit percentage range.

news.headline: Financial Institutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISI) to release Q2 earnings on July 25, 2024, after market close.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Financial Institutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISI), the parent company of Five Star Bank and Courier Capital, LLC, announced that they will report their second quarter results for the period ending June 30, 2024. The results are scheduled to be released after the market closes on July 25, 2024.

news.headline: Matrix Service Company (NASDAQ: MTRX) added to Russell 3000 Index on June 28, 2024, a leading contractor to energy markets.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Matrix Service Company (NASDAQ: MTRX) headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, disclosed its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index, which became effective following the conclusion of the U.S. equity markets on June 28, 2024. Matrix Service Company, a prominent engineering and construction contractor serving the energy and industrial sectors, celebrated this milestone achievement.

news.headline: Leonardo DRS delivers 1,000th sensor key to US Army, part of missile warning system, protecting from new threats.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, Leonardo DRS, Inc. revealed that they have delivered the 1,000th sophisticated sensor package crucial to BAE Systems’ 2-Color Advanced Warning System (2CAWS). This system serves as a cutting-edge defense mechanism against missile threats and hostile fires for U.S. Army personnel. The advanced DRS 2-color infrared detector package plays a pivotal role within BAE Systems’ 2CAWS setup meant for the U.S. military.

news.headline: McGrath RentCorp to announce Q2 2024 results on July 25 after market close, conference call at 5:00 pm EST.
news.summary: In Livermore, California, McGrath RentCorp, a prominent business-to-business rental company in North America, is set to reveal its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2024. The announcement is scheduled to occur after the closing of regular market trading on Thursday, July 25, 2024. Following this, McGrath RentCorp will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (2:00 p.m. Pacific Time) on the same day to analyze the outcomes. Investors and interested parties can join the conference call for further details.

news.headline: Badger Meter (NYSE: BMI) schedules Q2 2024 earnings call on July 19, 2024 at 10:00am CT with webcast available.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based corporation Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) revealed plans to release its second quarter earnings data on Friday, July 19, 2024, before the market opens. The earnings conference call is scheduled for 10:00am CT on the same day. Access to a live listen-only webcast will be available from the Investor section of the company's website. To actively take part in the conference call, individuals can pre-register using a provided link.
